usage_policy.goal: Keep useful long-form external guidance available with minimal context usage.
read_order: Use summary, trigger keywords, and project usage notes to decide relevance.
Open the cached raw document only when the summary is insufficient.
copyright_notes: Do not commit fetched raw documents into git.
Do not quote long passages in project documents or AI responses.
Follow the source license terms recorded in each entry.

guides.title: Harness Design for Long-Running Application Development
summary: Generator-Evaluator pattern (GAN-inspired) separates execution from evaluation for better quality
Three-agent architecture: Planner → Generator → Evaluator with negotiated sprint contracts
Every harness component encodes an assumption about model limitations — stress-test when models improve
Evaluator tuning is iterative; initial versions exhibit poor judgment despite identifying real issues
File-based artifact handoff preserves clarity across agent sessions without context compaction
project_usage: Phase 2 CC-SDD-01/02: Apply sprint contracts — reviewer-testable acceptance criteria in verification.md
Phase 1.5-18: Record capability separation rationale in ADRs for future consolidation
Phase 3 WF-47/50/53: Add verdict accuracy metrics for evaluator tuning cycle
Phase 6 sotp init: Per-project capability selection based on complexity
